experiment: Confidence-Cascade Memory - Gate #1 (sensor separability + baseline frontier)
substrate: GQA (pre-registered POSITIVE substrate; MLA negative is a later deliverable)

dataset.leak: gate1_leak.jsonl - 20/cell + leak-control twins, 400 plant / 400 control, seed0=900000

B1_always_rag_note: BM25-over-turns always-RAG UNDERPERFORMS full-history B0 here (acc 0.882 vs 0.948, abst 0.109 vs 0.017): within an 8k window the whole history fits, so retrieval that misses the plant (esp. distractor_dense) loses information. Tangential to Gate #1.
caveat: Qwen2.5-7B has MILD attention-decay within 8k (acc 0.971->0.915 over dist 5->80). The small-native-window regime that actually stresses the concept (old facts fall out of context) is a Step-2 refinement: cap history tokens so recovery is necessary.
